ਇੰਸਟਾ: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

ਟਵਿੱਟਰ: https://twitter.com/Foltynn

Roblox ਕੀ ਹੈ? ROBLOX ਇੱਕ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਖੇਡ ਦਾ ਮੈਦਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਕਸ਼ਾਪ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਮੌਜ-ਮਸਤੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਇਸ ਪੱਖੋਂ ਵਿਲੱਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿ ROBLOX 'ਤੇ ਲਗਭਗ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਦੇ ਮੈਂਬਰਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ROBLOX 13 ਤੋਂ 18 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਇਹ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਖੁੱਲ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਇੱਕ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਚੁਣ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਪਛਾਣ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ROBLOX ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ — ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਕੇ, ਗੇਮਾਂ ਖੇਡ ਕੇ, ਜਾਂ ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਕਰਕੇ ਦੂਜਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋਏ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਟੂਲਬਾਕਸ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੀ ਅਣਵਿਕਸਿਤ ਰੀਅਲ ਅਸਟੇਟ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਟੁਕੜਾ ਵੀ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਾਲ ਉਹ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ — ਭਾਵੇਂ ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਨੇਵੀਗੇਬਲ ਸਕਾਈਸਕ੍ਰੈਪਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈਲੀਕਾਪਟਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਪਿੰਨਬਾਲ ਮਸ਼ੀਨ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਮਲਟੀਪਲੇਅਰ "ਕੈਪਚਰ ਦ ਫਲੈਗ" ਗੇਮ ਹੋਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ, ਅਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਈ ਰਚਨਾ। ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਦੇ ਇਸ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪਲਾਟ ਲਈ ਕੋਈ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ। ਹਿੱਸਾ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ, ROBLOX ਮੈਂਬਰ ROBLOX ਡਾਲਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਬੈਜ ("Robux") ਵੀ ਕਮਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਬਦਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਕੱਪੜੇ ਅਤੇ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਉਪਕਰਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਬਿਲਡਿੰਗ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਹਿੱਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਵਿਧੀਆਂ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਲਈ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਕੈਟਾਲਾਗ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

రోబ్లాక్స్ అంటే ఏమిటి? రోబ్లాక్స్ అనేది ఒక ఆన్‌లైన్ వర్చువల్ ప్లేగ్రౌండ్ మరియు వర్క్‌షాప్. ఇక్కడ అన్ని వయసుల పిల్లలు సురక్షితంగా ఒకరితో ఒకరు సంభాషించుకోవచ్చు, సృష్టించుకోవచ్చు, ఆనందించవచ్చు మరియు నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. ROBLOX లో దాదాపు ప్రతిదీ కమ్యూనిటీ సభ్యులచే రూపొందించబడి, నిర్మించబడటమే దీని ప్రత్యేకత. ROBLOX 13 నుండి 18 సంవత్సరాల వయస్సు గల వారి కోసం రూపొందించబడింది, కానీ ఇది అన్ని వయసుల వారికి అందుబాటులో ఉంటుంది. ప్రతి ఆటగాడు ఒక అవతార్‌ను ఎంచుకుని, దానికి ఒక గుర్తింపును ఇవ్వడం ద్వారా ప్రారంభిస్తాడు. ఆ తర్వాత వారు చాటింగ్ చేయడం, ఆటలు ఆడటం లేదా సృజనాత్మక ప్రాజెక్టులపై సహకరించుకోవడం ద్వారా ఇతరులతో సంభాషిస్తూ ROBLOX ను అన్వేషించవచ్చు. ప్రతి ఆటగాడికి వారి స్వంత అభివృద్ధి చెందని భూభాగంతో పాటు, ఒక వర్చువల్ టూల్‌బాక్స్ కూడా ఇవ్వబడుతుంది. దానితో వారు దేనినైనా డిజైన్ చేసి నిర్మించవచ్చు — అది ప్రయాణించగల ఆకాశహర్మ్యం కావచ్చు, పనిచేసే హెలికాప్టర్ కావచ్చు, ఒక పెద్ద పిన్‌బాల్ మెషిన్ కావచ్చు, మల్టీప్లేయర్ “క్యాప్చర్ ది ఫ్లాగ్” గేమ్ కావచ్చు లేదా ఇంకా ఊహించని మరేదైనా సృష్టి కావచ్చు. ఈ మొదటి వర్చువల్ భూభాగానికి ఎటువంటి ఖర్చు ఉండదు. పాల్గొనడం ద్వారా మరియు అద్భుతమైన వస్తువులను నిర్మించడం ద్వారా, ROBLOX సభ్యులు ప్రత్యేక బ్యాడ్జ్‌లతో పాటు ROBLOX డాలర్లను (“రోబక్స్”) సంపాదించవచ్చు. దీనికి ప్రతిగా, వారు ఆన్‌లైన్ కేటలాగ్‌లో అవతార్ దుస్తులు మరియు యాక్సెసరీలతో పాటు ప్రీమియం నిర్మాణ సామగ్రి, ఇంటరాక్టివ్ భాగాలు మరియు పనిచేసే యంత్రాంగాలను కొనుగోలు చేయవచ్చు.

O que é Roblox? ROBLOX é um playground e oficina virtual online, onde crianças de todas as idades podem interagir, criar, se divertir e aprender com segurança. O que torna o ROBLOX único é o fato de praticamente tudo nele ser projetado e construído por membros da comunidade. O ROBLOX é voltado para jovens de 13 a 18 anos, mas é aberto a pessoas de todas as idades. Cada jogador começa escolhendo um avatar e dando a ele uma identidade. Em seguida, pode explorar o ROBLOX — interagindo com outros jogadores por meio de bate-papo, jogos ou colaborando em projetos criativos. Cada jogador também recebe seu próprio terreno virtual não desenvolvido, juntamente com uma caixa de ferramentas virtual para projetar e construir qualquer coisa — seja um arranha-céu navegável, um helicóptero funcional, uma máquina de pinball gigante, um jogo multiplayer de "Capture a Bandeira" ou alguma outra criação ainda não imaginada. Não há custo para este primeiro terreno virtual. Ao participar e construir coisas legais, os membros do ROBLOX podem ganhar distintivos especiais, bem como dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Por sua vez, eles podem usar os Robux para comprar roupas e acessórios para seus avatares no catálogo online, além de materiais de construção premium, componentes interativos e mecanismos funcionais.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: 🔴 [HI] TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring | Knockout Stage - Week 3 | Day 1
snippet.description:
Tickets to the TEZ FFMIC 2026 Spring LAN are live now!
https://bit.ly/tezffmic2026spring-gf

Last 12 standing. Week 3 starts now.

K9 Esports, Revenant XSpark, Aerobotz Esports, iQOO OGxTSG, 
Godlike Esports, Metaninza, GG Instinct, Team Tamilas, 
Reckoning Esports, WindGodxTHW Esports, 4Ends Esports 
and EMZ Esports drop into Week 3 Day 1.

Six of them are going to the Grand Finals. 
Six of them are going home. Day 1 starts deciding which is which.

🏆 TEZ Free Fire MAX India Cup 2026 Spring
📅 Knockout Stage — Week 3 | Day 1

🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications.

#FFMIC2026 #FreeFire #FreeFireMAX #TEZ #FFMIC #FeelTheFire

snippet.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
snippet.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee  

CREDITS

Composed & Performed by: Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan
Written by: Aditya Rikhari, Kutle Khan 
Producer: Ravator
Drums: Suyash Gabriel

en.title: Ae Ajnabee (Official Music Video) - Aditya Rikhari, Ravator, Kutle Khan | Coke Studio Bharat
en.description:
Coke Studio Bharat Season 4 opens with #AeAjnabee, a melodic journey into the heart of longing. Love may change its language, but that timeless ache for connection remains. Aditya Rikhari's warm vocals meet Kutle Khan's iconic Rajasthani folk sound, all brought together by producer and DJ, Ravator. This track bridges generations; letting the depth of folk breathe within pop's groovy sound. It's for those who remember whispered poetry and those who send late-night texts - a celebration of modern romance rooted in emotion.

Listen to Ae Ajnabee: http://UMGI.lnk.to/AeAjnabee  

CREDITS

snippet.title: तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna
snippet.description:
तीन बाण के धारी | छोटू सिंह रावना | Khatu shyam New bhajan | Teen baan ke Dhari | Chotu Singh Rawna

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो
👍 Like | 🔔 Subscribe | 💬 Comment ज़रूर करें

तीन बाण के धारी बाबा श्याम की महिमा को समर्पित यह नवीन भजन,
छोटू सिंह रावना की मधुर आवाज़ में।
खाटू नरेश श्री श्याम बाबा, जो तीन बाण धारण करने वाले कलयुग के देवता हैं,
अपने भक्तों की हर पुकार सुनते हैं और कष्ट हर लेते हैं।
यह भजन श्रद्धा, भक्ति और आस्था से भरपूर है।
🙏 बाबा श्याम से प्रार्थना है कि यह भजन आप सभी के जीवन में सुख, शांति और कृपा लेकर आए।
जय श्री श्याम 🙏
अगर भजन पसंद आए तो

snippet.title: Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
snippet.description:
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head)ft. beabadoobee  
i'll make a cup of coffee for your head lyrics     

Stream:-  
https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID 



Follow Powfu: 
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followII
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followTI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followFI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI



Lyrics:- 

[Intro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Verse 1: Powfu]
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, ayy)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Ayy, yeah)


[Verse 2: Powfu]
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Outro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed

snippet.title: 🤔Shinchan ने तोड़ा Nobita का Excavator! 😱 फिर Jack Bhaiya ने क्या किया? #indiantheftautosimulator
snippet.description:
🤔Shinchan ने तोड़ा Nobita का Excavator! 😱 फिर Jack Bhaiya ने क्या किया? #indiantheftautosimulator 


Things got heated in Indian Theft Simulator today! When Nobita refused to share his favorite excavator, Shinchan’s legendary temper took over. In a moment of pure rage, Shinchan smashed the excavator to pieces! 😱
Nobita, heartbroken and in tears, ran to get Bhabhi. After a heavy scolding and even getting kicked out of the house, Shinchan was about to leave... until Jack Bhaiya made his grand entry! 😎
Watch how Jack Bhaiya fixes the brotherly bond by taking them both to the toy showroom. Will a brand-new Realistic Oil Tanker for Shinchan and a shiny Auto-Rickshaw for Nobita finally bring peace? Or is this just the beginning of a new prank?
Watch till the end to see their reaction! 🎬

#IndianTheftSimulator #ShinchanVsNobita #JackBhaiya #RCGaming #ToyWar #EmotionalGaming #ShinchanHindi #NobitaStories #GamingLife #YouTubeShorts #TrendingGaming #ToyChallenge #RealisticGaming #shinchanfunnymoments 

Video Disclaimer & Credits:
This video is a unique combination of AI-enhanced storytelling and original gameplay.
​The Process: I use AI technology for the creative 1-minute intro/visuals, followed by my own original gameplay and voice-over for the rest of the 10-12 minute video.
​Voice & Characters: All character voices (like Shin-chan, Nobita, and Doraemon) are creatively performed by me using voice modulation and filters to enhance the storytelling.
​Editing & Quality: This content is edited by me (Original Editing) and rendered in 60fps for the best viewer experience.
​Fictional Content: This is a fan-made parody created for entertainment purposes only. No copyright infringement is intended.

Things got heated in Indian Theft Simulator today! When Nobita refused to share his favorite excavator, Shinchan’s legendary temper took over. In a moment of pure rage, Shinchan smashed the excavator to pieces! 😱
Nobita, heartbroken and in tears, ran to get Bhabhi. After a heavy scolding and even getting kicked out of the house, Shinchan was about to leave... until Jack Bhaiya made his grand entry! 😎
Watch how Jack Bhaiya fixes the brotherly bond by taking them both to the toy showroom. Will a brand-new Realistic Oil Tanker for Shinchan and a shiny Auto-Rickshaw for Nobita finally bring peace? Or is this just the beginning of a new prank?
Watch till the end to see their reaction! 🎬
